tools.name: promptarch_lint_artifact
tools.description: Lint an AI agent context file (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Cursor rules, Copilot instructions) with PromptArch's deterministic linter. Returns grade, 0-100 score, and findings. Free: no account or credits needed.

tools.name: promptarch_list_artifact_types
tools.description: List the artifact types PromptArch can generate.

tools.name: promptarch_generate_artifact
tools.description: Generate an AI agent context artifact (e.g. context_pack, claude_md) from a project description. Requires a PromptArch API key configured as an Authorization: Bearer pk_... header on this MCP server. Consumes credits.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "promptarch_generate_artifact" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
